songs

songs

Each song can have an external preview MP3, links, and a lyrics page. Audio files are meant to live outside GitHub, for example on the public file server.

other releases

These songs have an album name, but that album has not been added to _data/albums.yml yet.

    Dreaming in Daylight 20-05-2026

should be viewed on a computer unless you are a dweeb • no trackers • no bullshit • made with love :)
